calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ISEF-001 harm gradient baseline -- warm-start gate diagnostic
items.notes: DEV-NEED-029 warm-start gate. 2-arm diagnostic: ARM_0 proximity_harm_scale=0.05 (cold-start control) vs ARM_1 proximity_harm_scale=0.30 (treatment). PASS gates all downstream ARC-065, Q-043/044/045, INV-049 retests.

items.title: GAP-2 microhabitat zones env feature -- substrate readiness diagnostic
items.notes: infant_substrate:GAP-2 readiness. 2-arm: ARM_0 microhabitat_enabled=False (bit-identical OFF) vs ARM_1 microhabitat_enabled=True n_microhabitats=3 (defaults). C1 bit-identical OFF; C2 zone-map coverage {0,1,2}+border 3; C3 zone-C zero hazard + zone-B density > zone-A; C4 zone-C ambient bonus fires and decays. experiment_purpose=diagnostic (no governance weighting; claim_ids=[]). GAP-2 unblocks DEV-NEED-001/003/007 + ARC-065 via the full infant pipeline.
